---
title: "Attendee Prep Handout"
subtitle: "Inference with Predicted Data Workshop"
description: "One-page checklist for prerequisites, software setup, and package installation."
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    code-fold: false
---

Welcome! Thank you for joining this workshop, *Prediction-Based Inference: Methods & Applications*. 
This handout is a quick pre-session checklist so you can get set up smoothly if you would like to 
engage interactively with the workshop materials.

## Quick Checklist (10-15 minutes)

Complete these before the tutorial:

- Confirm you have a stable internet connection and a laptop.
- Choose your environment:
  - Recommended: Docker + browser-based RStudio
  - Alternative: local R/RStudio install
- Verify `ipd` and core R packages install successfully.
- Test that you can run one simple R command.

## Prerequisites

You should be comfortable with:

- Base R and `tidyverse` syntax (`dplyr`, `ggplot2`, basic pipes).
- Basic regression modeling (`lm`, `glm`).
- Basic predictive modeling concepts (train/test split, predictions, model error).

Helpful but optional (for the supplemental modules):

- Bioconductor familiarity (`ExpressionSet`, `AnnotationDbi`, `MLInterfaces`).

## Software Requirements

### Option A (Recommended): Docker Workshop Environment

Install Docker Desktop:

- [Docker Desktop (Windows/Mac/Linux)](https://www.docker.com/products/docker-desktop/)

Then run:

```sh
docker run -e PASSWORD=<choose_a_password_for_rstudio> -p 8787:8787 ghcr.io/salernos/ipd-workshop:latest
```

Open:

- `http://localhost:8787/`
- Login: username `rstudio`, password = what you set above

### Option B: Local R + RStudio

Install:

- [R (CRAN)](https://cran.r-project.org/)
- [RStudio Desktop](https://posit.co/download/rstudio-desktop/)

## R Packages to Install Ahead of Time

### Core packages (required)

```r
install.packages(c(
  "ipd", "broom", "tidyverse", "patchwork", "scales",
  "janitor", "GGally", "randomForest", "ranger", "mgcv",
  "pROC", "DALEX", "neuralnet", "partykit"
))
```

### Bioconductor packages (optional, used in supplemental content)

```r
if (!requireNamespace("BiocManager", quietly = TRUE)) {
  install.packages("BiocManager")
}
BiocManager::install(c(
  "ALL", "golubEsets", "AnnotationDbi", "hgu95av2.db",
  "hu6800.db", "MLInterfaces"
))
```

## 60-Second Setup Test

Run this in R/RStudio:

```r
library(ipd)
library(tidyverse)
sessionInfo()
```

If this runs without errors, you are ready.

## Links You'll Need During the Workshop

- Workshop site: [https://salernos.github.io/ipd-workshop](https://salernos.github.io/ipd-workshop)
- `ipd` package repo: [https://github.com/ipd-tools/ipd](https://github.com/ipd-tools/ipd)
- Unit 00 (start here): [Getting Started](Unit00_GettingStarted.qmd)

## Support

If you hit setup issues before the session, contact:

- Jesse Gronsbell: [j.gronsbell@utoronto.ca](mailto:j.gronsbell@utoronto.ca)
- Stephen Salerno: [ssalerno@fredhutch.org](mailto:ssalerno@fredhutch.org)
